summary: Applied a minimal seam polish to sharpen chapter handoff timing and reduce repeated transition scaffolding with adjacent chapters while preserving all scene beats, character voice, and causal flow.
edits: Added a dawn time anchor in the opening sentence to tighten continuity from the previous chapter's overnight transfer aftermath.
Changed the discharge section opener from 'By the time they discharged her' to 'When they discharged her' to avoid mirrored temporal scaffolding near the Chapter 16 handoff.
Added one end-of-chapter bridge clause about needing the lower drawer before Peter's rounds to cue the next chapter's opening domestic-control beat.
